messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0125",
  "title": "目录 Contents",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 目录 Contents

01

中国移动游戏市场现状分析

02

海外移动游戏市场现状分析

03

移动游戏典型产品&企业案例分析

04

全球移动游戏市场发展趋势

小游戏与APP正在重新构建“多端协同”战略；即便是存量竞争时代买量仍是最主要的获客手段；2026年手游关键词：大世界捉宠+自动化基建。

message.content:
This section serves as a table of contents and thematic overview, enabling retrieval of answers to questions regarding:
- **Topics:** The document's four core sections: current status of the Chinese mobile game market, current status of the overseas mobile game market, case studies of typical mobile game products and companies, and global market development trends.
- **Entities & Concepts:** Chinese and overseas mobile gaming markets, mini-games, APPs, multi-terminal synergy strategy, paid user acquisition (买量), open-world pet-catching gameplay, and automated infrastructure.
- **Dates:** 2026 (specifically cited for future mobile game trend forecasts).
- **Claims:** Mini-games and APPs are rebuilding a "multi-terminal synergy" strategy; paid traffic acquisition remains the primary user acquisition method despite market saturation; 2026 mobile game trends will center on open-world pet catching and automated infrastructure.
- **Definitions, Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics, & Evidence Types:** None are provided in this section; it functions exclusively as a structural index and high-level thematic summary.

response_text:
This section serves as a table of contents and thematic overview, enabling retrieval of answers to questions regarding:
- **Topics:** The document's four core sections: current status of the Chinese mobile game market, current status of the overseas mobile game market, case studies of typical mobile game products and companies, and global market development trends.
- **Entities & Concepts:** Chinese and overseas mobile gaming markets, mini-games, APPs, multi-terminal synergy strategy, paid user acquisition (买量), open-world pet-catching gameplay, and automated infrastructure.
- **Dates:** 2026 (specifically cited for future mobile game trend forecasts).
- **Claims:** Mini-games and APPs are rebuilding a "multi-terminal synergy" strategy; paid traffic acquisition remains the primary user acquisition method despite market saturation; 2026 mobile game trends will center on open-world pet catching and automated infrastructure.
- **Definitions, Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics, & Evidence Types:** None are provided in this section; it functions exclusively as a structural index and high-level thematic summary.
